CVE-2015-8366.title: Array index error in smal_decode_segment function in LibRaw befor ...
CVE-2015-8366.description: Array index error in smal_decode_segment function in LibRaw before 0.17.1 allows context-dependent attackers to cause memory errors and possibly execute arbitrary code via vectors related to indexes.

CVE-2017-16910.title: An error within the "LibRaw::xtrans_interpolate()" function (inte ...
CVE-2017-16910.description: An error within the "LibRaw::xtrans_interpolate()" function (internal/dcraw_common.cpp) in LibRaw versions prior to 0.18.6 can be exploited to cause an invalid read memory access and subsequently a Denial of Service condition.
